_comment: Ultra-Enhanced Pterodactyl/Pelican Egg for Icecast AutoDJ Radio Streaming - Created by @zeropointbruh
name: Icecast-AutoDJ-Extreme
author: wegj1@hotmail.com
description: Ultra-enhanced Icecast radio streaming server with AutoDJ, multi-playlist support, ads rotation, jingle injection, and advanced features. Created by @zeropointbruh (wegj1@hotmail.com) - https://banabyte.com. Compatible with both Pterodactyl and Pelican Panel.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

set -ex

echo "==========================================="
echo "AutoDJ-Extreme Installation v2.0"
echo "Created by: @zeropointbruh"
echo "==========================================="
echo ""

echo "[1/6] Checking environment..."
cd /mnt/server || { echo "ERROR: Cannot access /mnt/server"; exit 1; }
echo "Working directory: $(pwd)"
echo "Git version: $(git --version)"
echo ""

echo "[2/6] Cloning repository..."
REPO_URL="${REPO_URL:-https://github.com/ZEROPOINTBRUH/AutoDJ-Extreme.git}"
echo "Repository: $REPO_URL"
git clone "$REPO_URL" repo || { echo "ERROR: Git clone failed"; exit 1; }
echo "Clone successful!"
echo ""

echo "[3/6] Verifying files..."
ls -la repo/configs/ || { echo "ERROR: configs directory not found"; exit 1; }
echo ""

echo "[4/6] Copying configuration files..."
cp -v repo/configs/icecast.xml /mnt/server/icecast.xml
cp -v repo/configs/ezstream.v1.xml /mnt/server/ezstream.xml
cp -v repo/configs/run-enhanced.sh /mnt/server/run.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/run.sh
echo "Config files copied successfully"
echo ""

echo "[5/6] Creating directory structure..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/music
mkdir -p /mnt/server/log
touch /mnt/server/playlist.m3u
echo "Directories created"
echo ""

if [ "${ENABLE_ADS}" = "true" ]; then
    echo "Setting up ads directory..."
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/ads
    echo "# Place ads here (MP3, OGG, OPUS, FLAC, M4A)" > /mnt/server/ads/README.txt
fi

if [ "${ENABLE_JINGLES}" = "true" ]; then
    echo "Setting up jingles directory..."
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/jingles
    echo "# Place jingles here (MP3, OGG, OPUS, FLAC, M4A)" > /mnt/server/jingles/README.txt
fi

if [ "${USE_MULTI_PLAYLIST}" = "true" ]; then
    echo "Setting up multi-playlist directories..."
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists/playlist1
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists/playlist2
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/playlists/playlist3
fi

echo "[6/6] Creating helper scripts..."
cat > /mnt/server/refresh_playlist.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
EZSTREAM_PID=$(pgrep ezstream | head -1)
[ -n "$EZSTREAM_PID" ] && kill -SIGHUP $EZSTREAM_PID && echo "Playlist refreshed"
EOF

cat > /mnt/server/skip_track.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
EZSTREAM_PID=$(pgrep ezstream | head -1)
[ -n "$EZSTREAM_PID" ] && kill -SIGUSR1 $EZSTREAM_PID && echo "Track skipped"
EOF

chmod +x /mnt/server/refresh_playlist.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/skip_track.sh
echo "Helper scripts created"
echo ""

echo "Cleaning up..."
rm -rf repo
echo ""

echo "==========================================="
echo "Installation completed successfully!"
echo "==========================================="
echo "Next steps:"
echo "  1. Upload music to /music directory"
echo "  2. Start the server"
echo ""
echo "Created by @zeropointbruh | https://banabyte.com"

exit 0

variables.name: Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository URL for Icecast AutoDJ source code

variables.name: Enable Ads
variables.description: Enable ads rotation feature? Creates /ads folder for advertisement audio files.

variables.name: Enable Jingles
variables.description: Enable jingle injection feature? Creates /jingles folder for station IDs and jingles.

variables.name: Multi-Playlist Mode
variables.description: Enable multi-playlist support? Creates /playlists folder for organizing multiple playlists.

variables.name: Ads Frequency
variables.description: Play one ad every X songs (only if ads enabled)

variables.name: Jingle Frequency
variables.description: Play one jingle every X songs (only if jingles enabled)

variables.name: Source Password
variables.description: Password for streaming sources to connect to Icecast

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for Icecast web admin interface

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for Icecast web admin interface

variables.name: Relay Password
variables.description: Password for relay servers

variables.name: AutoDJ Password
variables.description: Password for AutoDJ mount point

variables.name: Live Password
variables.description: Password for live streaming mount point

variables.name: Mount Point
variables.description: Mount point for AutoDJ stream

variables.name: Max Clients
variables.description: Maximum concurrent listeners

variables.name: Max Sources
variables.description: Maximum streaming sources

variables.name: Stream Format
variables.description: Audio format for stream

variables.name: Station Name
variables.description: Your radio station name

variables.name: Station Genre
variables.description: Your radio station genre

variables.name: Station Description
variables.description: Your radio station description

variables.name: Hostname
variables.description: Hostname or IP for the radio server

variables.name: Location
variables.description: Geographic location of server

variables.name: Admin Email
variables.description: Contact email for server administrator
